case_title: RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC VS. ROBERT HURLEY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC SERVED JUL-24-2006, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HURLEY, ROBERT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-09-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
